item.name: Shovelnose Catfish
item.description:
This catfish's tapered snout lends it a lithe, sleek appearance.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: This peculiar catfish has a slender body that tapers towards the mouth. This characteristic, along with its long barbels, helps the wavekin trawl the substrate in search for tasty insects and microbial organisms.
